settings.richtext: From Berkeley Life Clinical Study

settings.text: Nitric Oxide (NO) was first recognized for its powerful effects on heart health, and it’s still one of the top reasons people use it today—and with the clinical data to back it up.

BLOOD PRESSURE
Dilates blood vessels to lower blood pressure

INCREASED CIRCULATION
Enhances blood flow better circulates oxygen and nutrients

REDUCED RISK
Lower risk of cardiovascular issues

INCREASED LONGEVITY
Reverse vascular tissue aging

As we AGE, or with lack of EXERCISE and poor DIET, buildup can start to form in our large and small blood vessels—the routes that carry blood to the heart and other vital organs. This buildup makes it harder for blood to flow freely.

—

That’s where NO comes in. It helps with vasodilation, or widening those blood vessels, so blood, oxygen, and nutrients can move more easily throughout the body, reducing strain on the heart and helping everything work smoothly.

settings.heading: **10%** Decrease In Blood Pressure In 90 Days
settings.content: Clinically proven to significantly reduce systolic pressure with daily use for 12 weeks.

settings.heading: **28%** Increase In Circulation In 90 Days
settings.content: Clinically proven to significantly increase blood flow with daily use for 12 weeks.

settings.heading: Up To **20%** Reduction In Inflammatory Blood Markers
settings.content: Clinically proven to reduce LDL cholesterol, C-Reactive Protein, and blood glucose levels in 12 weeks when taken daily.

settings.heading: Sustains N.O. Levels For **24 Hours**
settings.content: Clinically proven peak at 2 hours and maintain elevation for the duration of 24 hours.

settings.richtext: From Berkeley Life Clinical Study

settings.heading: The Proven Benefits on **Heart Health**
settings.text: Unlike many supplements, our products are backed by clinical studies. Our studies have shown the incredible benefits of our Nitric Oxide Support on heart health.
Just two capsules of Nitric Oxide Support, once a day, provide an effective dose of NO support for heart health throughout the day.

settings.heading: By The Age of 40, Your NO Levels **Decrease By 50%**
settings.text: And continue to decline as you age. This leads to decreased blood flow, impairing the delivery of oxygen and nutrients to cells, and contributing to common age-related issues, including poor heart health, hormone imbalance, weakened immune response, and increased inflammation.
